message:
feat(debug): Complete DWARF debug info and DAP server foundation

Phase 2 DWARF Debug Info:
- Add .debug_info section generation for local variables
- Add .debug_abbrev and .debug_str section generation
- Map Python variable names to Zig identifiers (keyword escaping)
- Capture type annotations from Python source
- Use -ODebug compilation when --debug flag is set

Phase 3 DAP Protocol Foundation:
- Create dap_server.zig with DAP message handling
- Implement breakpoint management
- Add stack frame and variable inspection
- Support step in/out/over commands

Zero Friction Philosophy:
- Works with existing Python toolchains (lldb/gdb)
- No IDE extension required
- Python-style tracebacks already show correct line numbers

Files:
- src/debug/dwarf_emitter.zig: DWARF section emission
- src/debug/dap_server.zig: DAP protocol server
- src/debug/debug_info.zig: Type hint support
- src/main/compile.zig: DWARF generation integration
- src/compiler.zig: Debug mode compilation
